name: ddd-workshop
description: DDD learning-friendly workshop with two paired skills covering domain learning and big-picture accumulation. (1) domain-classroom — teaches general industry patterns of an unfamiliar domain in lecture mode grounded in cognitive-science 8 principles (Cognitive Load management, Practice Testing, distributed practice, elaborative interrogation, self-explanation/Feynman, schema connection, dual coding, desirable difficulty). AI plays virtual domain expert (teacher), user is learner. Menu-driven (priority bundles 4+3+2) → phase deep-dive → 3 baseline Q&A with continue-or-skip choice. Laws/regulations/industry standards integrated as study material in body, not mere citations. AI judges whether to ask for input materials based on domain familiarity. Output: study-notebook style at docs/learning-notes/{domain}-classroom.md. (2) bigpicture-storytime — a 1:1 learning-friendly variant of Big Picture Event Storming. Accumulates the standard big picture artifact (time-ordered events, actors, external systems, hotspots, pivots, ubiquitous language) one actor and one chapter at a time via persona-perspective narratives + why-explanations + confidence tags. Output: docs/bigpicture.md. The two skills form a pipeline: domain-classroom builds general patterns first, then bigpicture-storytime overlays client-specific big picture. Either can run standalone.
